description: Relayers may deliver fabricated payloads if the destination contract does not validate Merkle proofs, light-client headers, or signatures that attest to the message on the source chain. Forged messages can mint wrapped assets or execute arbitrary calls.
name: Unverified Cross-Chain Message Proofs
remediation: - Verify message inclusion against a trusted root (Merkle/Patricia proof) or light-client header. - Validate signatures from authorized validators and enforce quorum thresholds. - Reject messages that fail proof verification or originate from unrecognized relayers.
